ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_text_id" TEXT /* Short code for the country (e.g., MEX for Mexico) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs (e.g., Latin America, Europe) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "languages" TEXT /* List of official languages (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country to which the metrics belong */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric data */,
  "media_index" REAL /* Index reflecting media freedom (0-1 scale) */,
  "party_autonomy_ord" INTEGER /* Rank of party autonomy (ordinal scale) */,
  "polyarchy" REAL /* Level of polyarchy (0-1 scale) */,
  "civil_liberties" REAL /* Index of civil liberties (0-1 scale) */,
  "party_autonomy" INTEGER /* Indicates whether party autonomy is present (true/false) */,
  "electoral_democracy" REAL /* Electoral democracy index (0-1 scale) */,
  "freedom_of_expression" REAL /* Freedom of expression index (0-1 scale) */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Government effectiveness index (0-1 scale) */,
  "human_rights_score" REAL /* Human rights score (0-1 scale) */,
  "corruption_index" REAL /* Corruption index (0-1 scale) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Freedom House, V-Dem, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's characteristics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "number_of_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value (e.g., 2015, 2016) */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a leap year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description of significant events or changes in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the user is based in */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES political_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom permissions are defined */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric tied to the permissions */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view the metric */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit the metric */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can delete the metric */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can share the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES political_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
